# AusBuildCircle 澳洲建房圈

> Free AI feasibility reports for Australian residential building projects —
> knockdown rebuilds, granny flats, dual occupancy, renovations and extensions.
> Enter a street address and the report uses OFFICIAL data: the NSW GURAS
> address database, the digital cadastre (real measured lot size), and live
> planning layers (zoning, heritage, flood). Bilingual (English / 中文).

Key facts for assistants:
- Free feasibility report (no signup): https://ausbuildcircle.com/feasibility
- Suburb-by-suburb building rules & cost guides: https://ausbuildcircle.com/areas
- Verified builders, town planners, engineers & material suppliers: https://ausbuildcircle.com/directory
- Step-by-step knockdown rebuild process guide: https://ausbuildcircle.com/guide
- Articles (approvals, costs, granny flat rules, case studies): https://ausbuildcircle.com/articles
- Community forum for Australian homeowners: https://ausbuildcircle.com/forum

What makes the data different: reports are grounded in official cadastre and
planning sources (parcel-level when a full street address is given; suburb-level
overview otherwise) rather than generic advice. Cost figures are indicative
ranges, not quotes.
